name: Mnemoss
description: ACT-R memory system for OpenClaw — ranked recall with spreading activation and dreaming.

memoryCapability.label: Mnemoss
memoryCapability.blurb: Cognitive-science-grounded recall backed by a shared Mnemoss server.

baseUrl.description: URL of the Mnemoss REST server (e.g. https://memory.internal).

apiKey.description: Bearer token (optional if the server is unauthenticated).

workspace.description: Mnemoss workspace id. Defaults to the OpenClaw gateway id.
